news_items.headline: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. looks to turn page on 2026 struggles: 'I've sucked all season'
news_items.summary: After the Yankees 2-1 win over the Dodgers, Jazz Chisholm Jr. was open about his rough 2026 when describing his season prior to his clutch HR.

news_items.headline: Jazz Chisholm Jr. hits tiebreaking homer in 8th and Yankees beat Dodgers 2-1 to split doubleheader
news_items.summary: The Yankees won for only the second time in their past 11 home games, avoiding a three-game sweep in the process.

news_items.headline: Diamondbacks 8, Cardinals 7 [Guest recap]
news_items.summary: While I do typically create a story for each guest recap, so I can add them to our stream of recaps, I usually do it a few days later. But if ever a game deserved to be front paged immediately, it’s this one. The D-backs tied a franchise record, coming from 7-0 down against the […]
